mapper.select: SELECT * FROM deduction_items_v2 WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO deduction_items_v2 (id, category_id, item_code, item_name, description, deduction_mode, fixed_score, per_person_score, min_score, max_score, sort_order, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.itemCode}, #{item.itemName}, #{item.description}, #{item.deductionMode}, #{item.fixedScore}, #{item.perPersonScore}, #{item.minScore}, #{item.maxScore}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt}, 0)
